rationale: Educ. Code §21.603 governs eligibility for a teacher certification program. It contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 21.603. ELIGIBILITY. A person is eligible for the program if:
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no overlap in subject matter.
